pi_items.source: Found in setup_task.sh and export_result.sh which create and check files at this exact path.
Found in setup_task.sh (docker-compose.yml mapping) and export_result.sh (curl command querying port 8090).
Found in setup_task.sh comments and task files which deliberately create 4 issues: root user, docker.sock mount, privileged container, and missing resource limits.
Found in export_result.sh which explicitly checks for the image tag "secure-web:hardened".

privileged_info_summary: The application directory is at /home/ga/insecure-app and runs on port 8090. There are exactly 4 security issues to fix: running as root (missing USER directive in Dockerfile), mounting the docker socket, running as a privileged container, and lacking memory limits (all in docker-compose.yml). The final fixed image must be tagged as "secure-web:hardened". All configurations and files are synthetically generated for this task.
